title: Lovalingo
description: A translation and localization stack for React and Next.js apps, with SEO and admin workflows.
body:
Lovalingo is a translation and localization stack for React and Next.js apps.

The active Rocket work spans the runtime package, marketing site, SEO content, database/admin work, and email-style inbox workflows. The product idea is simple: make multilingual web apps easier to operate without turning translation into a fragile one-off process.

## What it does

- Adds translation and localization capabilities to React and Next.js apps.
- Supports multilingual SEO surfaces such as sitemaps, canonicals, and localized pages.
- Gives teams operational tools around projects, users, and content workflows.
- Connects the public marketing story with the underlying product system.

## Current direction

Recent work focused on admin inbox management, email threads, SEO fixes, locale-aware URLs, and making the public site more resilient.
